title: Studio UI - Quick Settings enabled
scenario: Quick Settings toggle does not persist or function as expected in the Poly Studio Mobile app UI
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the Quick Settings icon (gear or shortcut) to enable Quick Settings.
Verify the Quick Settings panel or overlay appears.
expected: Quick Settings panel is displayed, showing toggles for common features (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
